userCard.userDescription: Systems Engineer with over 6 years of experience as a Frontend Developer, specialized in Angular and modern web development technologies. Passionate about creating innovative solutions, focused on quality, performance, and user experience

epam.title: EPAM Systems
epam.description1: Developed and maintained web applications using Angular and PrimeNG.
epam.description2: Implemented features using Angular Signals, RxJS, and NgRx for state management.
epam.description3: Developed reusable Angular libraries, wrote unit tests with Angular Testing Library and Jasmine, and maintained E2E tests with Cypress.
epam.description4: Collaborated in English-speaking Scrum teams and leveraged GitHub Copilot and Kiro to improve development speed and productivity.

alaxatech.title: ALAXATECH
alaxatech.description1: Corrective and evolutionary maintenance of the frontend of a vehicle buying/selling application (Angular 18 + SSR)
alaxatech.description2: Integration with backend API for data extraction and saving.
alaxatech.description3: E2E testing with Cypress in the payments module (90% coverage)
alaxatech.description4: Support to the QA team and active participation in Scrum teams.

applaudo.title: Applaudo Studios
applaudo.description1: Frontend development of a financial app for granting loans (Angular + Angular Material).
applaudo.description3: Maintenance of internal app for visual component documentation
applaudo.description4: Participation in daily meetings in English and collaboration with an international team.

piston.title: Piston Posicion
piston.description1: Interface development for GPS tracking app using LeafletJS.
piston.description2: Backend API integration and real-time data handling with WebSocket.
